channel.title: Protein Design Podcast
channel.description: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research
channel.itunes:author: Eva Dai
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-11
item.description: UniQure is in a unique situation, according to Derek Lowe's In the Pipeline blog. | Researchers at ACS Applied Materials & Interfaces have developed a novel materials-based platform to investigate how macrophages clear DNA within phagosomes. | A new transfer learning framework from bioRxiv improves B-cell epitope prediction by fine-tuning protein language models with phylogeny-informed adaptation.
item.itunes:author: Eva Dai
item.itunes:summary: UniQure is in a unique situation, according to Derek Lowe's In the Pipeline blog. | Researchers at ACS Applied Materials & Interfaces have developed a novel materials-based platform to investigate how macrophages clear DNA within phagosomes. | A new transfer learning framework from bioRxiv improves B-cell epitope prediction by fine-tuning protein language models with phylogeny-informed adaptation.
